name: @adopt-dont-shop/service.notifications
description: Notifications service — the first stateful extraction (Phase 1). Owns the notifications.* schema (Notification, DeviceToken, UserNotificationPrefs, EmailPreference, EmailQueue), exposes gRPC for create/list/dismiss, subscribes to NATS for fan-out, and feeds the gateway's WebSocket spine. Phase 1.1 commit is just the boot skeleton + health endpoint — schema, gRPC, NATS, and gateway wiring land in subsequent commits.
